meaning: n.<澳口>小卡车,轻型货车,轻便小货车
examples: Before using the UTE, the security information must be configured correctly.
The Portal UTE makes use of the MCS policies files directly from the file system.
In the Fabric 6.0.2 Tool Pack, the changes in the UTE repository (BSR) are approved automatically by the system.
Ute Kumpf has won Stuttgart North three times and expects to do so again.
He parks the truck on the top of the mountain, just feet away from an old Ute Indian game-tracking trail.
